meaning: n.亚述尔群岛(在北大西洋,属葡萄牙)
examples: Behind him lay the gray Azores.
He continued: 'There were 12 of us on the boat that day and we were heading for the Azores.
The Azores and Madeira, ethnically and geographically closest to the mother country, are still part of Portugal.
Indeed some thought the Azores summit would make him unacceptable to France and Germany.
In 1493, Pope Alexander VI, a Spaniard, decreed that all new lands discovered west of the Azores were Spanish.
